arts.ttl: David Ornstein shares what he’s heard about Harry Kane after he’s linked with Tottenham return
arts.sum: The January transfer window has just closed, but one of the biggest transfer stories of the year broke this week. Indeed, it has been revealed...

arts.ttl: Harry Kane release clause revealed in Bayern deal
arts.sum: Harry Kane has a release clause of £67m in his Bayern Munich contract that will become active this summer. Kane has been a huge hit since signing for Bayern from Tottenham Hotspur in 2023. The England captain has scored 70 goals in 72 appearances for the German giants and was winner of the European Golden […] The post Harry Kane release clause revealed in Bayern deal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: New coach and players for Dortmund in Bundesliga. More concerns in defense for leader Bayern
arts.sum: — Kovac has a tough first test against Stuttgart on Saturday and a Champions League playoff game at Sporting Lisbon next week. Borussia Dortmund has new coach Niko Kovac and some new players and needs to improve fast in the Bundesliga this weekend.

arts.ttl: Bayern duo struggling with illness ahead of Bremen clash
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany has revealed that two Bayern Munich players are battling minor colds ahead of Friday's Bundesliga clash with Werder Bremen.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Did Mathys Tel initially reject a move to Ange Postecoglou's side?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou denies that Mathys Tel initially rejected the chance to move to the club before reversing his decision.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane's stance on Bayern Munich exit as clause opens door to Premier League return
arts.sum: Harry Kane signed a four-year deal when he joined Bayern Munich from Tottenham in 2023 but we could see the England captain back in the Premier League in the no-so-distant future

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham Hotspur has right to match Harry Kane’s release clause at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: According to a report from Daily Telegraph football news correspondent Matt Law (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), there is an interesting wrinkle to Harry Kane’s release clause with Bayern Munich — Tottenham Hotspur has the right to match it: Premier League clubs are already aware of the existence of Kane’s release clause, which could be crucial to a potential return to England.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel could be thrown straight into Liverpool v Tottenham. This is what he’ll bring
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou persuaded Tel to join Tottenham on deadline day, and may need to drop the French 19-year-old into his starting XI for Thursday night’s Carabao Cup semi-final second leg at Anfield
